---
title: "Contact"
format: html
---

## Contact

Feel free to reach out for opportunities, collaborations, or just to connect.

<div style="margin-top: 20px;">

  <p style="font-size: 18px;">
    📧 <strong>Email:</strong><br>
    <a href="mailto:esshak@bu.edu" style="text-decoration: none; color: #000;">
      esshak@bu.edu
    </a>
  </p>

  <p style="font-size: 18px; margin-top: 20px;">
    🔗 <strong>LinkedIn:</strong><br>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/essha-khan/" target="_blank" style="text-decoration: none; color: #000;">
      linkedin.com/in/essha-khan
    </a>
  </p>

</div>
